metadata.description: Master investigation notes — everything relevant to identifying L11 deployer wallet
metadata.goal: Identify the deployer's next fresh wallet after it gets funded but before create_and_buy
metadata.raw_data_location: data/results/raw/ — full API responses for all investigations

deployer_behavioral_profile.post_deploy: Distribute tokens to 6 bundle wallets → BloomBot coordinated sell → profits to OG → collection → exchanges + Rollbit gambling
deployer_behavioral_profile.known_habit: Deployer gambles frequently on Rollbit with profits

OG_L1_L3.role: Original deployer, still active as profit aggregator and sometimes funds other deployers
OG_L1_L3.last_activity: 2026-03-20 — trading XAIC (L10 token), sending to collection wallet

L4.role: First fresh-wallet deploy. Still active trading XAIC today.

L5.role: Deployed TrollXRP. Sent 0.04 SOL to Collection Wallet on 2026-03-15 (L10 launch day). Sent 0.76 SOL to L7 deployer on 2026-01-23.
L5.note: Cross-wallet fund shuffling — sends to L7 deployer and Collection wallet months after its own launch

L6.role: Funded by OG deployer directly. Heaviest profit routing — $47K to Profit Pass 1, $21.5K to Profit Pass 2.

L7.role: Funded L8 directly. Sent 2 SOL to Collection Wallet on 2026-03-20. Actively draining profits.
L7.critical_note: This wallet chain-funded L8. Prior deployers can fund future deployers.

L8.role: Funded by L7 deployer, not directly from on-ramp. OG deployer sent $5.7K to this wallet.

L9.role: Funded by side-project (JETNUT) deployer. First launch where CoinSpot insider appeared.
L9.critical_note: Funding came from a side-project wallet, not hub or OG. Widens the set of possible L11 funders.

L10.role: Most recent launch. Switched from Coinbase to MoonPay.
L10.critical_note: MISSED because sieve was Coinbase-only. On-ramp source changed. Will likely change again for L11.

funding_path_evolution.description: The deployer varies the funding path every time. This is the #1 challenge for L11 detection.

history.path: Coinbase CB9 → OG deployer (direct, no fresh wallet)

funding_path_evolution.pattern: Intermediary changes: Hub (x3), OG (x1), prior deployer (x1), side-project (x1), direct (x1). On-ramp also changed.
funding_path_evolution.implication: Must monitor ALL known network wallets for 10-18 SOL outflows to fresh addresses, not just on-ramps.

coinbase.note: 10 wallets. CB1/2/5/7/8 CORRECTED 2026-03-24 (all were transcription errors). CB10 newly discovered.

moonpay.note: Only 1 MoonPay wallet mapped. Need full cluster mapping — deployer switched to MoonPay for L10.

intermediary_funders.description: Known network wallets that have previously funded deployers. Any of these could fund L11.

key_counterparties.rollbit: Deposits to Rollbit (RB5KKB7h... and RB2Yz3VS... — different addresses from deployer's known RB3dQF6T...)

Ed4UGBWK4UpwBKiGFkM2uQMTPpahPwxgxEWjJTRX.transfer_pattern: Rapid small SOL transfers back-and-forth with L6/L7 deployers (0.2-3.8 SOL, every 1-2 min). Active today.
Ed4UGBWK4UpwBKiGFkM2uQMTPpahPwxgxEWjJTRX.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK MEMBER — $30.6K sent to Collection Wallet (53 txs) + $1.3K sent to Hub Wallet + $92K to deployers = $124K+ flowing into the network. No outflow from Collection Wallet back to Ed4UGBWK. This is profit delivery, not trading. Combined with Rollbit gambling (deployer's known habit) and rapid small transfers to deployers, this wallet is almost certainly operated by the deployer or is a profit-generating bot controlled by them.
Ed4UGBWK4UpwBKiGFkM2uQMTPpahPwxgxEWjJTRX.collection_wallet_volume: $30,672 inflow over 53 transactions — #2 counterparty of Collection Wallet by volume
Ed4UGBWK4UpwBKiGFkM2uQMTPpahPwxgxEWjJTRX.rollbit_note: UNVERIFIED: RB5KKB7h and RB2Yz3VS cited as Rollbit deposits but no raw API data backs them. 2026-03-24 Arkham transfers query returned 0 Rollbit-related transfers in 100 results. These addresses may be transcription errors — do not rely on them without re-sourcing.

9cDDJ5g2wPqVZUZwpPuwqzxN7ouvc6QFauFwrX2T.transfer_pattern: Almost entirely inbound (receiving SOL/USDC). 9+ counterparties are other Fireblocks Custody wallets.
9cDDJ5g2wPqVZUZwpPuwqzxN7ouvc6QFauFwrX2T.verdict: RECLASSIFIED: CONFIRMED NETWORK PROFIT AGGREGATOR. Previously classified as 'NOT part of network' based on Fireblocks label alone. Route C discovery (2026-03-21) showed $49K flows in from 9exPdTUV passthrough (which receives from L7, Bundles 1/3/5/6, Hub). Combined with Route B inflows (OG, Hub, Bundles 1/3/5, 6UrYwo9F) and $28K outflow to Token Millionaire, this is a critical network node.
9cDDJ5g2wPqVZUZwpPuwqzxN7ouvc6QFauFwrX2T.reclassification_reason: Route C discovery: 9exPdTUV forwards $49K from L7+Bundles to this wallet. Previous verdict was wrong.

key_counterparties.l6_deployer: #1 counterparty — Jakey Token Deployer, $4.4K mostly outflow TO deployer

B2XLRSaQqcB2Ab5KSUSjiepinQTMZqsQCExsKt9G.verdict: Part of deployer network. Interacts with L6 deployer, RXRP pool, Bundle 3 (BloomBot), and OKX DEX. Low volume but connected.

key_counterparties.l7_deployer: #1 — IslandBoys Token Deployer, $29.2K mostly outflow TO deployer

3RmT3sTxX75cHPCJNjwzCXY87VBFEkZrZny7qXmr.verdict: Profit relay bot. Sends $29.2K to L7 deployer. Funded by another trading bot. Part of the network's profit collection layer.
3RmT3sTxX75cHPCJNjwzCXY87VBFEkZrZny7qXmr.note: First funder B27vwq89 is also in our cross-reference as unknown recurring wallet (L7 early buyer #19)

CQvXtWfC8Dz2EVU9jS7MjGeqaSfTpAzfZF87obyG.key_counterparties: Only 2 total: receives $9.5K from 6afg6U4c, sends $9.5K to L7 deployer
CQvXtWfC8Dz2EVU9jS7MjGeqaSfTpAzfZF87obyG.verdict: Pure passthrough wallet. Money in from one source, out to deployer. Part of the network.

DcbyADbNZanTyzhuWokNt5HrbYFFn4HmPygNPvLZ.verdict: Part of the network. Funded by F7RV6aBW (recurring early buyer across L7-L9), sends profits to L9 deployer.
DcbyADbNZanTyzhuWokNt5HrbYFFn4HmPygNPvLZ.critical_connection: Links F7RV6aBW (unknown recurring wallet, 3 launches) directly to the deployer network as a funder of this profit relay

9exPdTUVTCz9EKvZjXkKJSTJ5fZzJuwJHnFptrUF.role: Fireblocks passthrough — Route C of profit extraction
9exPdTUVTCz9EKvZjXkKJSTJ5fZzJuwJHnFptrUF.outflows: $49K forwarded to 9cDDJ5g2 (secondary aggregator) + $273 to E7VEsTzG (unknown, CORRECTED 2026-03-24)
9exPdTUVTCz9EKvZjXkKJSTJ5fZzJuwJHnFptrUF.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — passthrough relay. Receives from L7+Bundles, forwards nearly all to secondary aggregator. Route C discovered here.

BR1HiYtcYv5L9oB9aydMS9G9nYSjVZcMB51AxBFU.role: Second Coinbase deposit address for the network
BR1HiYtcYv5L9oB9aydMS9G9nYSjVZcMB51AxBFU.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — 2nd Coinbase deposit. Multiple network wallets feed profits here for cash-out.

4916NkdubkfRyHkxkCR7rpVGz5dvzVdK161mg4jX.inflows: Receives bundled tokens from Bundle 1 only (2x 12.5M tokens on separate launch dates, CORRECTED 2026-03-24 — was 'Bundle 1 + Bundle 3')
4916NkdubkfRyHkxkCR7rpVGz5dvzVdK161mg4jX.trading: Trades XAIC on Pump.fun ($4.6K). Sends SOL to F7oLGB1U ($5.2K).
4916NkdubkfRyHkxkCR7rpVGz5dvzVdK161mg4jX.verdict: CONFIRMED — CoinSpot insider receives deployer's bundled tokens directly from bundle wallets. Links insider to deployer's distribution infrastructure.
4916NkdubkfRyHkxkCR7rpVGz5dvzVdK161mg4jX.note: Funded by CoinSpot, not Coinbase — distinct from deployer's exchange pattern

DVrX592f_CORRECTED.status: RESOLVED — pump.fun bonding curve, not a wallet. Transcription error in prior session.

9PMGB6RE_CORRECTED.status: RESOLVED — pump.fun program account, not a wallet. Transcription error in prior session.

DLGHPXKF_FLAGGED.status: TRANSCRIPTION ERROR — zero from all 3 APIs (Helius, Nansen, Arkham). NOT found in OG deployer's Nansen counterparties on re-query (2026-03-21). Do not investigate.
DLGHPXKF_FLAGGED.original_claim: Top counterparty, 156 inflows/$25.3K — likely wrong address recorded in prior session

notable: 9exPdTUV: $1.8K outflow (Fireblocks passthrough — Route C, NOW RESOLVED)

uninvestigated_hub_counterparties.note: After resolving 9exPdTUV and BR1HiYtc, these remain uninvestigated:

A9eAH6Az.note: Balanced in/out suggests trading counterparty or exchange wallet. Lower priority.

hub_wallet_v49jgwyQ.verdict: Central operational hub. Funded 3 deployers (L4, L5, L7), traded on Pump.fun pools, extracted profits to Coinbase Deposit + Profit Pass 1 + Collection Wallet. Now drained (0.05 SOL). BloomBot first funder confirms bot infrastructure.

collection_wallet_Bra1HUNK.verdict: Confirmed profit aggregation wallet. Receives from entire network. Sends $50K to Token Millionaire. Route A endpoint.

large_funding_source_HVRcXaCF.nansen_counterparties: ERROR — excessively high trade activity — too noisy to query
large_funding_source_HVRcXaCF.verdict: Fireblocks-managed distribution wallet (exchange/service). Sent $4.2K to Hub Wallet. NOT deployer-controlled. Not useful for L11 detection.

profit_pass_1_4yWaU1Qr.role: Pure profit relay. Receives SOL from deployers/bundles/LFS, immediately forwards ALL to Ed4UGBWK.
profit_pass_1_4yWaU1Qr.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — primary profit relay. Every known network category funnels through here to Ed4UGBWK.

profit_pass_2_HDTncsSn.role: Intermediate relay + gambling deposit. Receives from Ed4UGBWK, forwards to profit_pass_1. Also sends to Rollbit and Collection.
profit_pass_2_HDTncsSn.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — secondary relay. Part of Ed4UGBWK loop: Ed4UGBWK -> profit_pass_2 -> profit_pass_1 -> Ed4UGBWK.

cold_usdc_1_8CvuX95R.role: SOL-to-USDC converter. Received 34.5 SOL from OG, swapped via SolFi/Raydium to ~$3.2K USDC, forwarded remainder to cold_usdc_2.
cold_usdc_1_8CvuX95R.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — single-use USDC conversion wallet.

cold_usdc_2_EAcUbdoi.role: Major aggregator + USDC converter + XAIC trader. Receives from 8+ network wallets.

nansen_counterparties.yNanvu8H: $2,201 out (2 txs — $2200 USDC + $1 USDC, NOT SOL)
nansen_counterparties.l9_funder: $367 in (SOL only — 1000 token transfer has negligible $ value)

cold_usdc_2_EAcUbdoi.note: Received 1000 pump.fun tokens from l9_funder (NOT 1000 SOL — script displayed wrong symbol). Also received 10 SOL from LFS on Mar 18.
cold_usdc_2_EAcUbdoi.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — active multi-purpose wallet. USDC conversion, token trading, aggregation. Still active Mar 20 2026.

coinbase_deposit_J6YUyB4P.role: PRIMARY Coinbase cashout point. Receives from Rollbit Treasury + entire network, distributes to all 10 CB hot wallets.

nansen_counterparties.Coinbase_Hot_GCRJD52p: $14,398 out (15 txs — unlisted Coinbase hot wallet)
nansen_counterparties.9cDDJ5g2: $510 in (3 txs — Route C aggregator sending here too)

coinbase_deposit_J6YUyB4P.total_coinbase_outflow: $265K+ to 10 Coinbase hot wallets + 2 Coinbase infra addresses
coinbase_deposit_J6YUyB4P.verdict: CRITICAL NETWORK NODE — main Coinbase cashout. $235K Rollbit winnings + $40K+ from network wallets, all forwarded to Coinbase.

binance_deposit_21wG4F3Z.role: Generic Binance deposit address. NOT deployer-specific.
binance_deposit_21wG4F3Z.evidence: Zero network connections. Massive throughput (hundreds/thousands of SOL per transfer to 5tzFkiKscXHK). No network wallet appears in any transfer. Nansen first funder is unrelated. Helius/Arkham labels conflict (both mislabels for a general-purpose deposit).
binance_deposit_21wG4F3Z.verdict: NOT NETWORK — generic Binance deposit address. Should be removed from network map profit_routing section.

rollbit_deposit_RB3dQF6T.role: Gambling deposit. Network SOL + Coinbase funds flow in, all forwarded to Rollbit Treasury.

nansen_counterparties.Coinbase_Hot_GCRJD52p: $15,312 in (41 txs — unlisted Coinbase hot wallet)

rollbit_deposit_RB3dQF6T.coinbase_to_rollbit_cycle: $184K+ from CB1-CB10 into rollbit_deposit. Deployer cashes out via Coinbase, then cycles funds back to Rollbit for gambling.
rollbit_deposit_RB3dQF6T.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — Rollbit gambling deposit. $233K deposited to Rollbit. $184K sourced from Coinbase hot wallets (recycled cashout funds).

routes_binance_DcEYX34v.first_funder: DfwNaPDhziicpVTHij8RHPqpdgNCWt7p72u7bbk2AGdU (L2: funded by Hub Wallet — confirmed network chain)
routes_binance_DcEYX34v.role: Multi-purpose router. Receives from OG/L7, sends to cold_usdc_2 + jetnut_network + Binance. Trades QTX token.

nansen_counterparties.l9_funder: $141 mixed (SOL only — large token transfers have negligible $ value)

routes_binance_DcEYX34v.token_transfers_note: Script misreported pump.fun tokens as SOL: 5M 'SOL' from l9_funder = pump token AUbqZLgz..., 28M 'SOL' between bundles = pump token D3Jw99nJ... These are token distributions, not SOL.
routes_binance_DcEYX34v.verdict: CONFIRMED NETWORK — active router. Hub->DfwNaPDh->routes_binance chain confirmed. Still active Mar 22 2026.

coinbase_gas_supplier_59L2oxy.helius_identity: Coinbase Gas Supplier & Staking Authority (Centralized Exchange)
coinbase_gas_supplier_59L2oxy.note: Coinbase infrastructure wallet. Funded coinbase_deposit with 0.00124 SOL gas.

rollbit_treasury_RBHdGVfD.note: Rollbit platform treasury. Funded rollbit_deposit with 0.002 SOL.

DfwNaPDh_hub_intermediary.note: NEW — Hub Wallet intermediary. Funds routes_binance. Previously noted in session_handoff open audit items (receives from Bundle 2) but never documented. Confirmed network: Hub -> DfwNaPDh -> routes_binance.

binance_deposit_funder_DobVMXp.note: Funder of binance_deposit. No network connections. Confirms binance_deposit is NOT network-specific.

7RLD6F9S_fireblocks_custody.note: NEW Fireblocks wallet in deployer infrastructure. Needs further profiling — where does this SOL go next?

yNanvu8H_usdc_recipient.receives: $2,201 USDC from cold_usdc_2 (2 txs: $2200 + $1 USDC on Feb 20 2026)
yNanvu8H_usdc_recipient.note: Unknown recipient of USDC from network. Needs profiling.

Fx7gAJpk_binance_deposit.note: Confirmed Binance deposit address used by routes_binance for cashout. This is the REAL deployer Binance deposit, not 21wG4F3Z.

9cDDJ5g2_new_detail.note: Already profiled wallet 9cDDJ5g2wPqVZUZwpPuwqzxN7ouvc6QFauFwrX2TTTAX now confirmed sending $510 to coinbase_deposit (3 txs) and $100 to rollbit_deposit (1 tx). Route C aggregator also feeds Coinbase and Rollbit cashout.

coinbase_to_rollbit_cycle.note: CB1-CB10 send $184K+ INTO rollbit_deposit (Nansen counterparties). Deployer cashes out profits via Coinbase, then recycles funds from Coinbase to Rollbit for gambling. This is a confirmed money cycle: Network -> coinbase_deposit -> Coinbase -> rollbit_deposit -> Rollbit.

bundle_wallet_verification.summary: All 6 bundle wallets profiled via Nansen counterparties + Arkham transfers

bundles_1_through_5.profit_routing: Via Profit Pass 1/2, Collection Wallet, Secondary Aggregator, Coinbase/Binance/Rollbit deposits
bundles_1_through_5.notable: Bundle 1 heaviest — Ed4UGBWK sends $52K IN, Bundle 1 sends $47K to Profit Pass 1

bundle_6_anomaly.funding_source: Axiom (NOT Coinbase — different from other 5 bundles)
bundle_6_anomaly.note: Only 11 connections vs 18-22 for Bundles 1-5. Trades different tokens. Much lower network volume. Possibly newer or semi-autonomous bundle.
bundle_6_anomaly.status: Confirmed network (receives bundled tokens, sends to network wallets) but operationally distinct

profit_extraction_map.description: Three routes for extracting profits from the network. Routes A and B converge at Token Millionaire (Fireblocks). Route D goes to Coinbase directly.

route_a.name: Collection Wallet Route
route_a.flow: Deployers (L4-L10) + Ed4UGBWK + Bundles + Hub + Eggsheeran + JETNUT → Collection Wallet (Bra1HUNK) → Token Millionaire (49mvMufi, Fireblocks)

route_b.name: Secondary Aggregator Route
route_b.flow: OG Deployer + Hub + Bundles 1/3/5 + 6UrYwo9F relay → 2q8nSJgC → Token Millionaire (49mvMufi, Fireblocks)

route_c.name: Fireblocks Passthrough Route
route_c.flow: L7 Deployer ($31.6K) + Bundles 1/3/5/6 + Hub ($1.8K) → 9exPdTUV (Fireblocks passthrough) → 9cDDJ5g2 (secondary aggregator) → Token Millionaire
route_c.note: Route C feeds INTO Route B's endpoint (9cDDJ5g2). The $49K Route C volume is ADDITIONAL to Route B's own $28K. Total through secondary aggregator: $77K+.

route_d.name: Direct Coinbase Deposit 2
route_d.flow: Hub ($5.2K) + l9_funder ($3.1K) + jetnut_network ($2.7K) + Bundle 5 ($2.5K) + OG ($1.1K) + Bundles 2/3 → BR1HiYtc (Coinbase Deposit 2) → Coinbase hot wallets

route_e.name: Primary Coinbase Cashout
route_e.flow: Rollbit Treasury ($235K winnings) + Hub ($13.8K) + OG ($11.3K) + L4 ($4.9K) + Bundles 2/5/6 ($5.6K) + Eggsheeran ($1.8K) + 9cDDJ5g2 ($510) → coinbase_deposit (J6YUyB4P) → CB1-CB10 ($265K+)
route_e.note: Largest single cashout route. Rollbit winnings ($235K) dominate inflows.

route_f.name: Rollbit Gambling Cycle
route_f.flow: CB1-CB10 ($184K) + L8 ($4.3K) + profit_pass_2 ($5.9K) + Bundles + deployers → rollbit_deposit (RB3dQF6T) → Rollbit Treasury ($233K)
route_f.note: Money cycles: network profits -> Coinbase cashout -> Coinbase sends to rollbit_deposit -> Rollbit gambling. $184K from Coinbase hot wallets confirms recycling.

route_g.name: USDC Conversion + Binance
route_g.flow: OG/Eggsheeran/L8/LFS/Bundle 4/l9_funder → cold_usdc_2 (EAcUbdoi) → SOL-USDC swaps + 7RLD6F9S (Fireblocks, $4K) + yNanvu8H ($2.2K USDC). Also: OG/L7 → routes_binance → Binance Deposit Fx7gAJpk ($1K) + 7RLD6F9S ($2.6K)
route_g.volume: $6.6K to 7RLD6F9S Fireblocks + $2.2K USDC to yNanvu8H + $1K to Binance
route_g.note: Active wallets — cold_usdc_2 last active Mar 20, routes_binance last active Mar 22.

endpoint.token_millionaire: 49mvMufixEbUMzZEUVAnbQ8hLLuEWy789XfKUNTz7wCv — Fireblocks Custody. Sends $45.3M to Large Funding Source. Exchange/custody endpoint. NOT deployer-controlled.
endpoint.total_extracted: $400K+ confirmed (Routes A-D: $143K to Fireblocks/Coinbase + Route E: $265K Coinbase + Route F: $233K Rollbit gambling). Note: Routes E and F overlap significantly — Rollbit winnings flow to Coinbase, Coinbase funds flow back to Rollbit.

profit_extraction_map.fireblocks_caveat: Arkham labels many wallets 'Fireblocks Custody' on Solana — it's a broad label covering any wallet that interacts with Fireblocks infrastructure. It does NOT mean these wallets are all the same entity.

flagged_addresses.note: 5 retired Coinbase wallets are expected (rotated hot wallets). 2 closed accounts expected. DLGHPXKF is a confirmed transcription error.

notable_helius_identities.binance_deposit_21wG4F3Z: RESOLVED 2026-03-25 — NOT network. Generic Binance deposit. Helius: 'Dexscreener Listing Fees 1', Arkham: 'Binance Deposit'. Zero network connections.
notable_helius_identities.phantom_fee_wallet: Helius: 'Phantom Swap Fees 1' — protocol-level fee collector. NOT a network signal.

labels.hub_funder_9Z83ZAtd: BloomBot Trading Bot User (Nansen) — first funder of Hub Wallet
labels.binance_deposit_21wG4F3Z: RESOLVED 2026-03-25: NOT deployer-specific. Generic Binance deposit address. Helius: 'Dexscreener Listing Fees 1', Arkham: 'Binance Deposit'. Zero network connections. Should be removed from network map.

not_a_signal.phantom_fee_9yj3zvLS: Phantom Swap Fees 1 (Helius) — protocol-level fee collector used by ALL Phantom users. NOT a network fingerprint. Downgraded 2026-03-21.

May be transcription errors or from an older time window not covered by current data.
rollbit_connections.status: UNRESOLVED — cannot verify Ed4UGBWK Rollbit connection without finding the original data source

49mvMufixEbUMzZE.verdict: RESOLVED — exchange/custody endpoint. NOT deployer-controlled. $45.3M throughput dwarfs deployer's $127K.

DZc1evNLyaufVzUA.verdict: RESOLVED — confirmed network member. 5 connections, sends to network's Binance Deposit, trades L10 token.

2q8nSJgCpaZZjchK.verdict: RESOLVED — confirmed network profit aggregator. Routes B+C converge here. Sends $28K+ to Token Millionaire. Previously misclassified.

9Z83ZAtd7vjEFvXf.role: First funder of Hub Wallet. Added to network map.

5 launches, consistently top-10. Absent from L8/L9. Rotation candidate.

Recently active, position #3 at L8. Needs investigation.

E2NnJHhcMhwrMT2qZDJicnGLFQZw44ceqTAcrqo8.status: Confirmed exists in OG counterparties (2026-03-21 re-query). Needs full profiling.

items.result: 8 wallets profiled. binance_deposit (21wG4F3Z) reclassified as NOT network. New Fireblocks wallet 7RLD6F9S discovered. Coinbase-Rollbit gambling cycle confirmed ($184K+). See profit_routing_profiles section.

items.task: Profile new unknowns from profit routing
items.targets: 7RLD6F9S (Fireblocks Custody, $6.6K from network), yNanvu8H ($2.2K USDC from cold_usdc_2)

items.note: Confirmed in OG counterparties ($2K, 70 txs). Needs full profiling.
Only 1 MoonPay wallet known. Deployer switched to MoonPay for L10. Critical for L11 detection.
Pull XAIC token trades via Nansen tgm/dex-trades (all trades, filter client-side). Add to launch-details.json.
Watch all network wallets + on-ramp hot wallets for 8-25 SOL outflows to fresh addresses. Final deliverable.
